property.source: OnTheMarket current asking-price snapshot + HM Land Registry PPD fallback
property.referencePeriod: Current 2026 OnTheMarket asking-price snapshot on 2026-04-01 for semi-detached homes with 3+ bedrooms and 2+ bathrooms; fallback uses HM Land Registry 12-month stratified transaction window 2025-04-01 to 2026-04-01 with a local 800m catchment first and an explicit 1600m extended-area fallback when the nearer sample is too sparse (with prior-year comparison window for trend proxy)

transport.source: TfL Journey Planner + OSRM (with station-profile fallback)
transport.referencePeriod: Snapshot query windows (peak/off-peak) with fallback where unavailable

schools.source: DfE GIAS open state-funded establishment exports + DfE Explore Education Statistics school performance data
schools.referencePeriod: Counts refreshed from GIAS open state-funded export dated 2026-04-01; primary quality from KS2 202425 Revised; secondary quality from KS4 202324 Final

pollution.source: London Datastore LAEI + DEFRA UK-AIR LAQM background maps

greenSpace.source: OpenStreetMap greenspace polygons via Overpass API
greenSpace.referencePeriod: Current OpenStreetMap greenspace snapshot via Overpass API station-scope pull

crime.source: data.police.uk custom-area street-level crime pulls + interpolated station population denominator

planning.referencePeriod: Current planning.data.gov.uk geometry pull for brownfield land, conservation areas, and article 4 direction areas
